response.justification: While Bogdan is a strong full-stack engineer with solid software craftsmanship principles and some cloud infrastructure experience, he does not meet the minimum qualifications for this infrastructure platform role. Most critically, the position requires 8 years of C++ programming—Bogdan has approximately 6 months (at National Instruments). The role also requires 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems work; his relevant experience totals roughly 1.5-2 years. His background is better suited for full-stack application engineering rather than systems-level platform leadership.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering across multiple platforms with proven ability to ship products (top 10 Apple TV app at WatchUp)
Direct experience with high-performance distributed systems (Dunnhumby's millions of requests/second infrastructure) and cloud tooling (AWS CDK)
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship, mentoring, and knowledge sharing through Refactoring Dojos, workshops, and technical courses
concerns: Only 6 months of C++ experience versus the required 8 years—a critical gap for a systems-level infrastructure platform role
Infrastructure and distributed systems background is 1.5-2 years versus the required 5 years minimum
No formal technical leadership experience in cloud or DevOps engineering; background is primarily in web/application development
